text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
...I'm a little concerned about the swelling in your
legs. I think it would be prudent to take some
time off to recover.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
I did a full examination, but there don't appear to
be any serious issues. Let's just keep an eye on
your progress for now.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, I'm glad.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzzt... Bzzzt...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Whoa, I've got forty unread messages on LANE?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
My Mom and Dad sent me way too many
messages...
choice_data_list: It shows how worried they were about you.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, I guess I should have expected it. I was
suddenly hospitalized after competing in the
Derby, after all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin's family came to cheer her on during the
Derby, and they've already been informed of the
situation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I told them it wasn't anything serious, and that I'd
stay by Ines's side while she recovers. But they
still must have been really worried.
choice_data_list: Why not visit home while you rest up?
Why not visit home while you rest up?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, that's probably a good idea. Seeing me in
person might put their minds at ease.
choice_data_list: They'll love having their big sis home again.
They'll love having their big sis home again.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You're right! I'm sure I'd be bored out of my mind
while I rest my legs anyway.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
And while I'm away, Trainer, I'm counting on you
to come up with a training routine for my next
race, the Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that decided, I submit a request for leave to
the academy and have Ines Fujin return home for
a week to rest up.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Don't go eating anything weird while I'm gone,
okay, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I guess I'll just have to trust you...
Okay, I'm off!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look on until Ines Fujin's train has left the
station.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I return to my office, I notice the Derby
materials that I left strewn across my desk are
neatly organized.
choice_data_list: I wonder if Ines cleaned up for me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I sit at my uncluttered desk and begin thinking.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho is the final race of the Classic
Triple Crown. At 3,000 meters, it's truly a battle
of stamina. If Ines Fujin is to have a chance...

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
...So you have concerns that her body won't be
able to hold up?

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
I understand where you're coming from. We at the
academy were also quite worried about her
condition following the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
She'll need additional support. And not just
physical—we also need to make sure that she
remains mentally balanced.

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Pushing her body to its limits inevitably puts
strain on her mental health, too.

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Please watch over her with even more care from
here on out.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hey! I'm back, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A week passes by in the blink of an eye. After an
examination at the hospital, it appears we're
ready to return to training without issue, but...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I've got something reeeally important to
tell you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin launches into discussion the moment we
arrive at the gym.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
So the thing is... I'm hoping to develop a more
efficient running style for my future races.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yeah. I mean... I collapsed after the Derby, right?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I want to make sure that never happens again. I
need a way to prevent myself from becoming so
exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
So I thought I'd need to create a new running
style! What do you think?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her request is just what I had hoped for.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some Umamusume have extreme difficulty trying
to alter the style they've grown accustomed to.
That's why it requires a long-term commitment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, if it helps alleviate the burden she puts
on her body, then it's definitely worth a shot.
choice_data_list: Great idea! Let's work on it during camp!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: All right! I'll leave the regimen changes up to you!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hopefully this will help my body stay together and
lessen the time I spend recovering.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Erm, Boss, I have something I need to talk to you
about.

text_block_list.name: Convenience Store Manager
text_block_list.text: Oh, what's up, Ines?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer is fast approaching, which means we'll be
attending camp. I'll need to come up with a new
training schedule before then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ines Fujin's next goal is the Kikuka Sho.
